description_long: This is a classic wooden nightstand with a rich brown finish and a rectangular top surface. The front features two spacious drawers, each equipped with ornate metal handles, providing both storage and decorative appeal. The nightstand stands on four elegantly curved cabriole legs, giving it a traditional and refined appearance. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain without additional ornamentation. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a smooth, polished surface that highlights the natural wood texture. This piece would complement vintage or traditional urban interiors, offering both functionality and style.
description: A traditional wooden nightstand with two drawers, ornate metal handles, and curved cabriole legs, finished in a polished brown wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with ornate metal handles and the detailed cabriole legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain and the profile of the curved legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden back and the full width of the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the wood grain and leg curvature.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
